title: EcoOntologyQuantitativeSignalV1
description: Payload shape for a sanitized quantitative environmental signal (limit / measured value / exceedance multiple). The ontology owns the SHAPE only; real measured enterprise values live consumer-side and are never stored here. additionalProperties:false is the structural red line: raw attachments, GPS, secrets, and full report text cannot appear.

pollutant_ref.description: Pollutant code or reference id, e.g. COD / SO2 / a KB pollutant ref. Not a raw value.

risk_domain.description: Optional S01-S13 grounding for the signal.

basis_ref.description: Legal instrument or standard reference the limit derives from, e.g. li.std.gb8978_1996.

value.description: Consumer-provided measured value; the ontology stores only synthetic samples, never real enterprise measurements.

sample_ref.description: Reference to the monitoring sample, never raw report text or attachment.

exceedance_multiple.description: 超标倍数: derived ratio summary of measured against limit.
